name: dfmt_exec
description: Execute code in sandbox. Returns intent-matched excerpts to save tokens.

intent.description: STRONGLY RECOMMENDED. Short phrase about what you need (e.g. 'failing tests', 'imports'). Filters response to matching excerpts; saves 70-90% tokens vs raw.

lang.description: Language: bash, sh, node, python, go, etc. Default: bash

return.description: Output mode: 'auto' inlines small / summarizes large (default), 'raw' full inline, 'summary' summary+matches only, 'search' matches+vocab only.
